description: Index of all guidelines issued by the Personal Data Protection Commissioner / Jabatan Perlindungan Data Peribadi (JPDP) under the Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (Act 709)

guidelines.title: Guideline on Data Breach Notification 2025
guidelines.subject: Mandatory notification of notifiable data breaches to the Commissioner and affected data subjects

guidelines.title: Guideline on Data Protection Officer 2025
guidelines.subject: Mandatory appointment, qualifications, responsibilities, and registration of Data Protection Officers

guidelines.title: Guideline on Cross-Border Personal Data Transfer 2025
guidelines.subject: Transfer mechanisms, adequacy determinations, appropriate safeguards, and derogations for cross-border personal data transfers

guidelines.title: Guideline on Personal Data Protection Notices
guidelines.subject: Content, format, language, and delivery of data protection notices under the Notice and Choice Principle
